zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Fraser of Auchinschogill於大約1345年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾圖時，他的父親William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris28歲，母親Margaret Moray31歲。他於大約1371年與Mrs. Marjory Fraser of Monymusk在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1397年享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Fraser of Auchinschogill于大约1345年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾圖时，他的父亲William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris28岁，母亲Margaret Moray31岁。他于大约1371年与Mrs. Marjory Fraser of Monymusk在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1397年享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Fraser of Auchinschogill was born about 1345, in Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, his father, William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Moray, was 31. He married Mrs. Marjory Fraser of Monymusk about 1371, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1397, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Fraser of Auchinschogill est né environ 1345, à Touch, Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Moray, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Marjory Fraser of Monymusk environ 1371, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1397, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Fraser of Auchinschogill um 1345 in Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Moray 31. Er hat um 1371 in Schottland, United Kingdom Mrs. Marjory Fraser of Monymusk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1397 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

Lui sposato Mrs. Marjory Fraser of Monymusk circa 1371, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1397, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Fraser of Auchinschogillが約1345年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアトウチで生まれた時，父William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durrisは28歳，母Margaret Morayは31歳であった。約1371年にイギリススコットランドでMrs. Marjory Fraser of Monymuskと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1397年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Fraser of Auchinschogill(이)가 대략 1345년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 토우치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Moray(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1371년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Mrs. Marjory Fraser of Monymusk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1397년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Fraser of Auchinschogill родился около 1345 г. в местности тоуч, стирлингшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Moray, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Marjory Fraser of Monymusk около 1371 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1397 г. в возрасте 53 лет.
